name: Shrimp Newburg
recipeInstructions:
1. Make white sauce by melting butter, add flour and cook until it bubbles, then add onions and simmer for a minute.
2. Add hot milk and cook until the sauce thickens.
3. Add peeled raw shrimp, pimentos, and liquid from one can. Stir in Lea & Perrins sauce, dissolved beef bouillon cubes in hot water, dry mustard, chopped onion tops, and Tabasco sauce.
4. Before removing from heat, add beaten egg and cream.
5. Mushrooms are optional.
